name: csp
description: Fast, local, token-efficient hybrid code search for agents. Registers the csp MCP server (search, find_related) and a csp-search skill.

interface.shortDescription: Fast, local, token-efficient code search for agents.
interface.longDescription: Hybrid (dense embeddings + BM25) code search built for agents. Returns the exact code snippets they need using ~98% fewer tokens than grep+read, entirely on CPU with no API keys or external services. Bundles the csp MCP server (search, find_related) and a csp-search skill.
defaultPrompt: Use csp to find where authentication is handled in this repo.
Use csp to locate the function that saves the model to disk.
